methodology: Account-relative (return %) ranking with 65/35 train/test out-of-sample guard. Same-day open/close; DTE>0 = longer-dated option held intraday. Options modeled (Black-Scholes, VIX-anchored). Out-of-sample survival is NOT a profit promise.
